title: eriogonum inerme
intro: Eriogonum inerme, also known as jointed buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Eriogonum inerme include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
